title: Official Game Control Calibration Basket
description: Surface-specific H2H basket used to calibrate GAME_CONTROL_COEF in engine.js. Chosen for sufficient real-match sample and sensitivity to consolidating positive runs, protecting leads and closing sets.

matchups.note: Serve-led closer versus another elite server.
Djokovic should convert pressure into scoreboard runs.

Return-heavy profile trying to suppress a serve-first opponent.
Federer closing ability against explosive shotmaking.
Classic serve control versus elite return pressure.
Hard-court control between two strong consolidators.
Stability and scoreboard management against a volatile hitter.
Positive-run management in a balanced elite rivalry.
Clay advantage should translate into more sustained score control.
